guides.title: Game Guides
guides.metaDesc: All Kingshot event, PvE, PvP, and gear guides in one place.

bear.title: Bear Hunt — Rally Leader Lineup Recommendations

tips.title: Operational Tips
tips.li2: F2P: prioritize joining high-power alliance rallies

overview.title: Event Overview
overview.body: Bear Hunt is an alliance event available every 48 hours where you can obtain valuable items such as Hammers.

troops.title: Troop Composition
troops.li1: Operate at a final ratio of 1:1:8 (Infantry:Cavalry:Archers)

heroes.title: Hero Lineups
heroes.li1: Rally Leader: assign your strongest rally-focused hero first
heroes.li2: Rally Members: prefer heroes whose first Expedition skill grants ATK/Break (destruction) buffs

mode.title: Solo vs Rally Participation
mode.li2: Join 6 rallies led by stronger alliance members
mode.li3: Operating a total of 7 lineups is the key to high scores
